title: SDN252 Configuration Document
fullText: SDN252 Configuration Document Step-1: Please select the transaction- Pull iLPN Cases and click program template. Step-2: Click Add Step-3: Please add below entries as below and click save. Note: Please don’t change the from & to entry, always it should be 601. Step-4: Please enable this param. Step- 5 : Enable transaction parameter on all linked transactions Go to Transactions UI Search for “Pull Full iLPN” Enable new parameter 601 on all transactions that have this parameter available Go to Transactions UI Search for “Pull iLPN” Enable new parameter 601 on all transactions that have this parameter available Step- 6 : Validate configuration of transactions in use Go to Task Action UI Filter for Inventory Need Type = 1 and Menu Mode = Task Assembly Program Go to Transactions UI and ensure all the transactions listed have the new transaction parameter 601 enabled: Step- 7 : Configure all INT2 Task Assembly Transactions Repeat steps for INT2 Step- 8 : Configure all INT9 Task Assembly Transactions Repeat steps for INT9 Step- 9 : Once it done, please clear the cache from UI.

chunks.text:
[Document: SDN252 Configuration Document]

SDN252 Configuration Document Step-1: Please select the transaction- Pull iLPN Cases and click program template. Step-2: Click Add Step-3: Please add below entries as below and click save. Note: Please don’t change the from & to entry, always it should be 601. Step-4: Please enable this param. Step- 5 : Enable transaction parameter on all linked transactions Go to Transactions UI Search for “Pull Full iLPN” Enable new parameter 601 on all transactions that have this parameter available Go to Transactions UI Search for “Pull iLPN” Enable new parameter 601 on all transactions that have this parameter available Step- 6 : Validate configuration of transactions in use Go to Task Action UI Filter for Inventory Need Type = 1 and Menu Mode = Task Assembly Program Go to Transactions UI and ensure all the transactions listed have the new transaction parameter 601 enabled: Step- 7 : Configure all INT2 Task Assembly Transactions Repeat steps for INT2 Step- 8 : Configure all INT9 Task Assembly Transactions Repeat steps for INT9 Step- 9 : Once it done, please clear the cache from UI.
